taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Organ Function Tests and Hormones (BI11.1-2).

words.clue: Liver enzyme bound to bile canalicular membrane, rises in cholestasis
Protein synthesised by hepatocytes that reflects chronic liver synthetic function
Pigment that causes jaundice when elevated above 2-3 mg/dL
Canalicular enzyme sensitive to alcohol use, confirms hepatic origin of raised ALP
Hormone produced by thyroid follicular cells, contains iodine
Pituitary hormone that stimulates the thyroid gland
Renal function marker that rises when GFR falls below 50%
Pattern of liver injury with predominant ALT and AST elevation

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
